courses.title: Claude 101
courses.summary: Learn how to use Claude for everyday work tasks, understand core features, and explore resources for more advanced learning on other topics.

courses.title: Claude Code 101
courses.summary: Learn how to use Claude Code effectively in your daily development workflow.

courses.title: Introduction to Claude Cowork
courses.summary: Learn to work alongside Claude on your real files and projects. This hands-on course covers the Cowork task loop, plugins and skills, file and research workflows, and how to steer multi-step work responsibly — so you're productive in your first week.

courses.title: Claude Code in Action
courses.summary: Integrate Claude Code into your development workflow

courses.title: AI Fluency: Framework & Foundations
courses.summary: Learn to collaborate with AI systems effectively, efficiently, ethically, and safely

courses.title: Building with the Claude API
courses.summary: This comprehensive course covers the full spectrum of working with Anthropic models using the Claude API

courses.title: Introduction to Model Context Protocol
courses.summary: Learn to build Model Context Protocol servers and clients from scratch using Python. Master MCP's three core primitives—tools, resources, and prompts—to connect Claude with external services

courses.title: AI Fluency for educators
courses.summary: This course empowers faculty, instructional designers, and educational leaders to apply AI Fluency into their own teaching practice and institutional strategy.

courses.title: AI Fluency for students
courses.summary: This course empowers students to develop AI Fluency skills that enhance learning, career planning, and academic success through responsible AI collaboration.

courses.title: Model Context Protocol: Advanced Topics
courses.summary: Discover advanced Model Context Protocol implementation patterns including sampling, notifications, file system access, and transport mechanisms for production MCP server development.

courses.title: Claude with Amazon Bedrock
courses.summary: As part of an accreditation program created for AWS, Anthropic launched a first-of-its-kind training for AWS employees. Here's the full course so you can follow along.

courses.title: Claude with Google Cloud's Vertex AI
courses.summary: This comprehensive course covers the full spectrum of working with Anthropic models through Google Cloud's Vertex AI.

courses.title: Teaching AI Fluency
courses.summary: This course empowers academic faculty, instructional designers, and others to teach and assess AI Fluency in instructor-led settings.

courses.title: AI Fluency for nonprofits
courses.summary: This course empowers nonprofit professionals to develop AI fluency in order to increase organizational impact and efficiency while staying true to their mission and values.

courses.title: Introduction to agent skills
courses.summary: Learn how to build, configure, and share Skills in Claude Code — reusable markdown instructions that Claude automatically applies to the right tasks at the right time. This course takes you from creating your first Skill to distributing them across teams and…

courses.title: Introduction to subagents
courses.summary: Learn how to use and create sub-agents in Claude Code to manage context, delegate tasks, and build specialized workflows that keep your main conversation clean and focused.

courses.title: AI Capabilities and Limitations
courses.summary: An introductory course about how AI works
